title: Velton
body:
## Velton Alpha
Velton is a basic anti-cheat addon for [Hand-Shaker](https://modrinth.com/project/hand-shaker) system. It blocks well known free and paid cheat clients, including injectable cheat clients.

## Installation

1. Download Velton and [Hand-Shaker (4.1.0+)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/hand-shaker/versions).
2. Put Velton and Hand-Shaker in client mods folder.
3. Put Hand-Shaker in paper plugins or fabric server mods folder.
4. Run a Server, use `/handshaker add velton required`or add manually in server configs.
5. Done, now distribute your modpack with Velton & Hand-Shaker.

## Issues

This is Early stage of anti-cheat, so not all cheat could be detected, or false detection may happen. Please report the issues to dicord or github. Additionally if player uses cheat client mod, it can be blaklisted using Hand-Shaker
